title: A Word from the President, November 2015
summary: Photo by Yuit, LLC. In mid-October, thousands of Alaska Native people came together for the 49th annual Alaska Federation of Natives (AFN) Convention at Anchorage’s Dena’ina Civic and Convention Center. title: Shareholder and Descendant Spotlight: Cy Two Elk
summary: CIRI descendant Cy Two Elk and Amanda Cash. Photo by Jamey Bradbury. Anchorage residents may have noticed a bright yellow food truck parked at various places around the city this summer. summary: The following CIRI shareholders do not have a current mailing address on record. title: Ladera Community Breaks Ground
summary: CIRI Land Development Company has broken ground on its 1,100-acre planned community in San Antonio, Texas. title: New Alaska Native Business Minor at UAA
summary: The University of Alaska Anchorage (UAA) now offers the first-ever minor in Alaska Native Business Management. title: Local Nonprofits Score with CIRI Golf Classic
summary: For the 32nd year running, CIRI held its annual Golf Classic in August, raising more than $110,000 for local youth and education nonprofits. title: In Memory, November 2015
summary: Carol Ann Segura, 80 Carol Ann Segura passed away Sept. 8 at the Alaska Native Medical Center in Anchorage. Ms. Segura was born Feb. 19, 1935, in Marshall, Alaska. title: November 23, 2015 – Jace Martin
summary: For 12 years, he was the lead vocalist of the band The Wolfpack. Jace Martin has now created a new sound of his own.
